# Synthetic Licensed Macro Note

This is a fabricated fixture. It is not paid research and contains no confidential information.

The example author argues that heavy Treasury issuance may keep the term premium elevated even if
headline inflation cools. The claim would weaken if long-duration Treasuries absorb supply while the
dollar and real yields fall together. AI infrastructure spending is mentioned as a possible competing
use of capital, but the note explicitly treats that link as an unverified hypothesis.
